title: Reasonable Estimation
text: The mass of an electron is incredibly small - far smaller than everyday objects or even atoms as a whole.

title: Reasonable Estimation $$2$$
text: A proton is about $$2000$$ times heavier than an electron, and a proton has mass $$\pm {10}^{-27}$$ kg. So an electron mass is roughly $${10}^{-30}$$ kg.
